headline: Paul R. Garcia Named Chair of Deluxe Board of Directors
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, April 24, 2026--Deluxe (NYSE: DLX), a trusted Payments and Data company, has announced the election of Paul R. Garcia as the independent Chair of its Board of Directors.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Global Payments, Lowers Price Target to $81
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Coad   maintains Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $85 to $81.

headline: Global Payments: Cheap For A Reason Or Turnaround In The Making?
summary: Global Payments (GPN) after the $22.7B Worldpay deal: deep discount vs risks, $600M synergies, leverage & integration.
